mapper.select: SELECT * FROM standard_parameters WHERE active = true ORDER BY category ASC, code ASC
SELECT * FROM standard_parameters WHERE standard_document_id = #{standardDocumentId} AND active = true ORDER BY category ASC, code ASC
SELECT * FROM standard_parameters WHERE parameter_standard_id = #{parameterStandardId} AND active = true ORDER BY category ASC, code ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM standard_parameters WHERE standard_document_id = #{standardDocumentId} AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM standard_parameters WHERE parameter_standard_id = #{parameterStandardId} AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
SELECT * FROM standard_parameters WHERE standard_document_id = #{standardDocumentId} AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
SELECT * FROM standard_parameters WHERE parameter_standard_id = #{parameterStandardId} AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO standard_parameters (standard_document_id, parameter_standard_id, code, name, value, category, description, active, deployment_standard, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{standardDocumentId}, #{parameterStandardId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{value}, #{category}, #{description}, #{active}, #{deploymentStandard}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE standard_parameters SET standard_document_id=#{standardDocumentId}, parameter_standard_id=#{parameterStandardId}, code=#{code}, name=#{name}, value=#{value}, category=#{category}, description=#{description}, active=#{active}, deployment_standard=#{deploymentStandard}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
